result.stderr:
DcmAnonymize 2.5.0
Copyright (C) 2026 Alexander Moerman

  -p, --parallelism    (Default: 8) Process this many files in parallel

  --blank-rectangle    One or more rectangular regions to blank in the pixel
                       data. Provide values in the shape (x1,y1)->(x2,y2), e.g.
                       (0,0)->(10,10)

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.

  value pos. 0         Anonymize these DICOM files. When missing, this option
                       will be read from the piped input.

Invalid arguments provided
